  "findings": [
    "Missing lockable disconnect means for motor maintenance",
    "Severe safety hazard violating Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) safety protocols"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the motor circuit immediately at the upstream distribution panel",
    "Lock out and tag out the upstream breaker",
    "Install an approved, lockable disconnecting means within sight of the motor location"
  ],
  "rationale": "The absence of a lockable disconnecting means within sight of the motor or its driven machinery is a direct violation of NEC Article 430.102. Because the asset is in service, this presents an immediate, critical safety risk to maintenance personnel who cannot safely isolate the equipment locally.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.102",
    "OSHA 1910.147"
  ]
}
